children.heading: .—Liability of Corporation
children.label: a .—Liability of Corporation
children.text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.

children.heading: .—Immunity of Individuals
children.label: b .—Immunity of Individuals
children.text: A member or private individual is not liable for the obligations of the corporation.
